title: 3 Solar Stocks Worth Watching Amid Lack of Government Policy
text: Buoyed by growing capacity additions and expanding corporate investments, the fate of U.S. solar stocks remains bright despite a lack of policies. You may keep ENPH, FSLR and SPWR in your watchlist.

title: First Solar (FSLR) Signs Deal to Supply 378 MWdc Modules
text: First Solar (FSLR) is set to deliver 378 MWdc of its thin-film photovoltaic (PV) solar modules to Scout Clean Energy.

title: First Solar (FSLR) Inks Agreement to Sell Japanese Platforms
text: First Solar (FSLR) clinches an agreement with PAG Real Assets involving the sale of the 293 MW utility-scale solar project development platform and a solar O&M platform.
